concept: How about a game where I control a character who explores a world where physical laws are determined by ancient monuments that can be activated or deactivated? One area might have reversed gravity, another might have accelerated time, while a third could have fluid physics applied to solid objects. Puzzles require understanding how different physical laws interact when their influence zones overlap or conflict. The protagonist discovers they're descended from the civilization that built these monuments and can potentially create new laws rather than just manipulate existing ones.
